Automatically Collected InformationThe Application may collect certain information automatically, including, but not limited to, the type of mobile device you use, your mobile deviceâ€™s unique device ID, your mobile operating system, the type of mobile Internet browsers you use, and information about the way you use the Application.Â This information helps the Company to identify any performance issues of the Application and improve the Application over time.

Starting with version 3.0 and above, the name of the account used on the device is logged for the purpose of automatic restoring of previously made purchases in the Application (in accordance with the standard authorization flow for all Google APIs and all components of Google Play services).

What are my opt-out rights?You can stop all collection of information by the Application simply by uninstalling the Application. You may use the standard uninstall process available as part of your mobile device or via the mobile application marketplace or network.

heading_content_part: Data Retention Policy, Managing Your InformationWe will retain User Provided data for as long as you use the Application and for a reasonable time thereafter. We will retain Automatically Collected information for up to 24 monthsÂ and thereafter may store it in aggregate.

ChildrenWe do not use the Application to knowingly solicit data from or market to children under the age of 12. The Application for iOS devices is rated as 12+ content rating; the Application for Android is rated as â€œlow maturityâ€ (definitions of each app platform apply). If a parent or guardian becomes aware that his or her child has provided us with information without their consent, he or she should contact us at hello@plantpurple.com.Â We will delete such information from our files within a reasonable time.

We are concerned about safeguarding the confidentiality of your information. We provide physical, electronic, and procedural safeguards to protect information we process and maintain. For example, we limit access to this information to authorized employees and contractors who need to know that information in order to operate, develop or improve our Application. Please be aware that, although we endeavor to provide reasonable security for the information we process and maintain, no security system can prevent all potential security breaches.

ChangesThis Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time for any reason. Any changes to our Privacy Policy will be posted on this website with an updated timestamp in the bottom of this page.Â You are advised to consult this Privacy Policy regularly for any changes, as the continued use of the Application is deemed approval of all changes.

Your ConsentBy using the Application, you are consenting to our processing of your information as set forth in this Privacy Policy now and as amended by us.
